productDisplayName: Vishudh Women Cotton Silk Blue Kurtas
description: Composition Turquoise blue kurta made of cotton and silk blend fabric, that has printed panel on the front and on the sleeves, mega sleeves, mandarin collar with a slit neckline, brocade paneling on the collar and on the upper bust and slit side hems Fitting Slim Wash care Hand wash separately as colour may bleed Use mild detergent Do not dry in direct sunlight Do not bleach Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Use warm iron Upgrade your casual look with this chic kurta from vishudh! The turquoise fabric and the brocade detailing adds a festive touch grey kurta, while the cotton and silk blend fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day long. Team it with leggings or a white loose kameez and silver sandals for a chilled out look. Model Statistics The model wears size M in kurtas Height-5.7", Chest-33"
